title: Lesson 1088: 清純, 正常, 制する...

items.gloss: to hold back (e.g. emotions); to rein in (e.g. a horse, unruly people); to bridle; to get the better of; to control; to command
orderly; regular; systematic; well-organized; well-organised; trim; tidy; accurate
dressing up in fine clothes; splendid clothes; one's best clothes
grand; magnificent; lavish; large scale; prosperous; thriving; lively; forceful; powerful; vigorous
good and evil; purity and impurity; voiced and unvoiced consonants
